ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apparel_size_guides" (
  "size_guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide entry */,
  "apparel_type" TEXT /* Type of apparel (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses, outerwear) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL, 1X, 2X, 3X) */,
  "bust_in" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_in" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style or clothing item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size guide was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size guide was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size guide is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_size_guides_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_size_guides_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_size_guide_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide detail */,
  "size_guide_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size guide entry */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Shoulder Width, Sleeve Length) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes for the measurement */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style or clothing item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size guide detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size guide detail was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size guide detail is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_size_guide_details_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_size_guide_details_size_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_guide_id") REFERENCES apparel_size_guides ("size_guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_size_guide_details_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style or clothing item */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style or clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the style or clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style or clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses, outerwear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)
